title: Indulgent Iced French Doner Meat Binchotan-Grill Cooked Doner Meat
description: A twist on classic doner meat, served with a refreshing iced sauce and a side of toasted Madeleine. This dish is perfect for a weeknight dinner or lunch.

ingredients.name: Burgundy wine reduction
ingredients.notes: Rich and fruity reduction made from burgundy wine.

ingredients.name: Mustard mayonnaise
ingredients.notes: Homemade mayonnaise with a tangy kick.

ingredients.name: Fresh lemon juice
ingredients.notes: To add a touch of citrus.

instructions: Preheat the binchotan grill to 180 degrees Celsius.
Season the doner meat with salt and black pepper.
Grill the doner meat for 5 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
Slice the cooked doner meat into thin strips.
Soak the Madeleine in water for a few minutes to make them soft.
Drain the Madeleine and toast them lightly on the binchotan grill.
Mix the burgundy wine reduction with the mustard mayonnaise to make the sauce.
Chill the sauce in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes.
Serve the doner meat with the sauce, toasted Madeleine, and a sprinkle of parsley.
Refrigerate any leftovers for up to 3 days.
